# RenderLogic

> RenderLogic is a creative studio and software lab combining cinematic
> post-production with AI software development. Based in Kerala, India.

## About
RenderLogic operates two sides under one brand:
- **Creative Studio** — film & video editing, color grading, and directing.
  Credits include the films *Vichithram* and *Aattam*. Founder: Achu Vijayan.
- **Software Lab** — offline-first AI applications for creators.

## Products
- **Parayu** — an offline AI voice-to-text / dictation app for desktop (macOS,
  Windows) and mobile (iOS, Android).
- **RenderLogic Director (RenderMagic)** — an AI video-generation application.

## Key pages
- Home: https://renderlogic.in/
- Sitemap: https://renderlogic.in/sitemap.xml

## Contact
